name: IN865 (865-867 MHz)
description: India ISM band. Three mandatory 125 kHz uplink channels.
notes: Three mandatory channels: 865.0625, 865.4025, 865.985 MHz (radio 0 centered 865.2325, radio 1 at 865.985). No default high-BW or FSK channel. RX2 866.55 MHz SF10BW125 (DR2). Slots 3-7 are disabled in the rendered radio block.
